text.message: bro Why do I get paired with top 60 global players
I am NOT that guy pal
maybe worry about red, dont worry about me, Im in a 7 loss streak
you are top 1 in my heart <3
any of you guys were at world final in stuttgart?
plz let me win or I'll quit
nope there is no live tournament in France
sometime i wanna do something about that but it's mostly USA
I was in the worlds, but not at final
no in germany and Switzerland there are a lot of in person tourneys
i don't even know how to qualify for worlds final as a french lol
i've been playing for a year i dont have that much exp
idk just come to Germany if you want :D
there is the french national tournament
wanna go to Berlin for techno mucic lol
6512 still great for red, we all lose
and oj goes 10 9 11 and I am locked
i have wood no matter what i'm happy
brick port, best wheat, best ore, coordinated 5s
I let myself be manipulated last second
i think 8510 is first pick here tbh
i missed that it was the brick port
but i also wouldnt have gotten wood on the way back
I am used to lower I guess
everything is possible, everything is balanceable
i just play ranked to be #1 in my city
haven't had the time for them though
where do I go? sheep port or 3:1?
i'm not sure about the solo man
Sry bro I am slightly overstimulated here
i have a nice game i think but solo is kidda hard lol
I can ONLY solo you though
bro just cause I got 1 more vp I am not ahead of red...
i mean oj is more problematic here
i don't have easy settle except 5
black has significantly more production than me and 1 more dev
2 ore for red that doesnt produce is a lot
u have city in hand still nearly
you guys are not trading me any wheat like you said black
I was offering for brick earlier
bro u need to propose earlier
i'm not your army comp man
i know but u had 3 ores in hand
I think u are the only road player
if oj is smart he go for you
i'm taking it easy on you now red
i need ur brick and could have
i dont have the cards he wants
sorry red, I'm still more worried about you here with the setup
go for your win cond man
i guess oj is and blue are super happy
red ill trade on ur turn
are you trying to plow wood port red?
what do you need for pop ?
probably we lose to bot lol
i can't really take road now
do u need wood for road?
if we lose to bot we loose to but
i have 4 woods if u want
do you want me to save wood or no?
he goes for win cod lol
you would have used yop or rb or mono
